JUMPING JACK (jumping jacks exercise) + PARACHUTE JUMPING. Safe from assassin TIME and red words MAN/DRILL/GRASS/DICE.

Completed 'JUMPING' clue (PARACHUTE + JACK both correct). Guessing further risks hitting red or neutral. Passing to let spymaster give fresh clue for 2 remaining blue words.
SNAKE connects: GRASS (snake in the grass), DICE (snake eyes = 1-1 roll), DRILL (plumber's snake = drain auger). Avoids TIME (assassin), PAN/TARGET (blue).

Snake eyes is a famous dice term (rolling two ones). Strong connection to SNAKE clue.

Secured 2/3 from SNAKE clue (GRASS, DICE). Game is tight with both teams needing 2 words. Passing to allow fresh spymaster clue rather than risk hitting neutral/opponent word on uncertain third connection.

Both remaining blue words are round/circular: PAN (frying pan is circular) and TARGET (bullseye target is circular). Avoided TIME (assassin) and red words MAN/DRILL which are not associated with roundness.
PAN is clearly round (round cookware). The second word likely relates to round motion (DRILL) or round shape (TARGET).
